name: Uno's Deep Pan Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Sausage, removed from the casing and crumbled
1 can Whole tomatoes, drained and coarsely crushed
3 tsp Dried oregano OR 5 Fresh basil leaves, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the warm water into a large mixing bowl and dissolve the yeast with a fork.
2. Add 1 cup of flour, all of the cornmeal, salt, and vegetable oil. Mix well with a spoon.
3. Continue stirring in the rest of the flour (1/2 cup at a time) until the dough comes away from the sides of the bowl.
4. Flour your hands and the work surface and knead the ball of dough until it is no longer sticky.
5. Let the dough rise in an oiled bowl, sealed with plastic wrap, for 45 to 60 minutes in a warm place, until it is doubled in bulk.
6. Punch down the dough and knead briefly.
7. Press the dough into an oiled 15-inch deep dish pizza pan until it comes up the sides by 2 inches and is even on the bottom of the pan.
8. Let the dough rise for 15-20 minutes before filling.
9. Preheat the oven to 500°F.
10. While the dough is rising, prepare the filling: cook the crumbled sausage until no longer pink and drain excess fat; drain and chop the tomatoes.
11. When the dough has finished its second rising, lay the cheese over the dough shell.
12. Distribute the sausage and garlic evenly over the cheese.
13. Top with the tomatoes and seasonings.
14. Bake for 15 minutes at 500°F, then lower the temperature to 400°F and bake for an additional 25-35 minutes.
15. Lift a section of the crust occasionally with a spatula to check on its color; it should be golden brown when done.
16. Serve immediately.
